questionHtml:
The overall equation for the production of hydrogen cyanide, HCN, is shown below.

CH4 (g) + NH3 (g) +32O2 (g) → HCN (g) + 3H2O (g)

State why NH3 is a Lewis base.

meta.title: State why NH3 is a Lewis base.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.4.6—A Lewis acid is an electron-pair acceptor and a Lewis base is an electron-pair donor. Apply Lewis acid–base theory to inorganic and organic chemistry to identify the role of the reacting species.
